title: A mixing method and system
abstract: A method and a system for improving mixing of content in a container 3 provided in a filter system 1, said method comprising providing a mixing loop 13 parallel to a recirculation flow path 11 of the filter system 1.
claims: Claims A method for improving mixing of content in a container (3) provided in a filter system (1), said container (3) being connected to a filter (5) by a recirculation flow path (11), said method comprising providing a mixing loop (13) to the container (3), said mixing loop being provided in parallel with the recirculation flow path (11) of the filter system (1). A method according to claim 1, further comprising controlling a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of properties of content in the system and/or conditions in the system. A method according to claim 1 or 2, further comprising controlling a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of operational conditions of a feed pump (12) arranged to supply content from the container (3) to the filter (5). A method according to claim 3, further comprising the steps of: switching the mixing pump (19) on when the feed pump (12) pumps feed to the filter (5) at a flow rate below a predefined threshold rate; and/or switching the mixing pump (19) off when the feed pump (12) pumps feed to the filter (5) at a flow rate above a predefined threshold rate. A method according to claim 1 or 2, further comprising controlling a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of sensor responses from at least two sensors (23 a, 23b) provided at different locations in the system, said sensors measuring the same property of the content in the container (3). A method according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising controlling a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of fluid flow into the container (3) provided from an additional pump and fluid line separate from the recirculation flow path (11). 7. A filter system comprising a container (3) with a content connected to a filter (5) by a recirculation flow path (11), wherein the filter system further comprises a mixing loop (13) in connection with the container (3), said mixing loop (13) being provided in parallel with the recirculation flow path (11). 8. A filter system according to claim 7, further comprising a control system (21, 21 ') arranged to control a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of properties of content in the system and/or conditions in the system. 9. A filter system according to claim 7 or 8, further comprising a control system (21) arranged to control a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of operational conditions of a feed pump (12) provided in the recirculation flow path (11) . 10. A filter system according to claim 7, 8 or 9, further comprising a control system (21 ') arranged to control a mixing pump (19) provided in the mixing loop (13) in dependence of sensor responses from at least two sensors (23a, 23b) provided at different locations in the system and measuring the same property of the content in the container. 11. A filter system according to claim 9, wherein said filter system comprises the container (3) with a content, the filter (5) connected by the recirculation flow path (11) to a recirculation inlet (7) and a recirculation outlet (9) of the container (3) and a feed pump (12) provided in the recirculation flow path (11) pumping content of the container (3) to the filter (5), wherein the filter system further comprises the mixing loop (13) parallel to the recirculation flow path (11), said mixing loop comprising a mixing pump (19) and is connected to a mixing inlet (15) and a mixing outlet (17) of the container (3) and said filter system comprising the control system (21) which can communicate with both the mixing pump (19) and the feed pump (12). 12. A filter system according to claim 11, wherein the control system (21) further is arranged to control the mixing pump (19) to be switched on when the feed pump (12) pumps feed to the filter (5) at a flow rate below a predefined threshold rate and/or control the mixing pump (19) to be switched off when the feed pump (12) pumps feed to the filter (5) at a flow rate above a predefined threshold rate. 13. A filter system according to any one of the claims 8-12, wherein the mixing pump (19) a disposable pump. 14. A filter system according to any one of the claims 7-13, wherein the container (3) is a flexible, disposable bag. 15. A filter system according to claim 14, wherein the container is a flexible, disposable, hanging bag.
